summary: Add 'events by-classification' aggregation that groups local events by segment+genre with count + examples per bucket.
reason: Brief Workflow #5 + Table-Stakes 'cross-classification aggregation in one call' gap. Mechanical GROUP BY over events × classifications.
validated_outcome: --help pass; SAMPLE column uses ASCII unit separator (0x1F) as intra-cell delimiter to avoid GROUP_CONCAT comma collisions.
